ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vessels" (
  "vessel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vessel */,
  "vessel_name" TEXT /* Name of the vessel */,
  "vessel_type" TEXT /* Type of the vessel (e.g., cargo, passenger, naval) */,
  "imo_number" INTEGER /* IMO number of the vessel */,
  "mmsi_number" INTEGER /* MMSI number of the vessel */,
  "built_year" INTEGER /* Year the vessel was built */,
  "flag_country" TEXT /* Country of the vessel's flag */,
  "gross_tonnage" REAL /* Gross tonnage of the vessel */,
  "net_tonnage" REAL /* Net tonnage of the vessel */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the vessel in meters */,
  "beam" REAL /* Width (beam) of the vessel in meters */,
  "draft" REAL /* Draft of the vessel in meters */,
  "propulsion_type" TEXT /* Type of propulsion (e.g., diesel, electric) */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used (e.g., diesel, LNG) */,
  "crew_size" INTEGER /* Number of crew members */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Cargo or passenger capacity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status (e.g., operational, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vessel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vessel_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vessel type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the vessel type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vessel type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position entry */,
  "vessel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vessel the position belongs to */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the position data */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the vessel */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the vessel */,
  "speed" REAL /* Speed of the vessel */,
  "heading" REAL /* Heading of the vessel */,
  "course" REAL /* Course of the vessel */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the position data (e.g., GPS, AIS) */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the position data in meters */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the vessel (if applicable) */,
  "depth" REAL /* Depth of the vessel below water level */,
  "satellites" INTEGER /* Number of satellites used for GPS positioning */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_positions_vessel_id FOREIGN KEY ("vessel_id") REFERENCES vessels ("vessel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status entry */,
  "vessel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vessel the status belongs to */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the status data */,
  "status_code" INTEGER /* Status code of the vessel */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the status code */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the status data (e.g., manual input, sensor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statuses_vessel_id FOREIGN KEY ("vessel_id") REFERENCES vessels ("vessel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor entry */,
  "vessel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vessel the sensor belongs to */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor (e.g., temperature, pressure) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the sensor data */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the sensor reading */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the sensor value */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the sensor on the vessel */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the sensor (e.g., active, faulty) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_vessel_id FOREIGN KEY ("vessel_id") REFERENCES vessels ("vessel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, operator, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "vessel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vessel being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the vessel */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the vessel was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  "action" TEXT /* Detailed action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_vessel_id FOREIGN KEY ("vessel_id") REFERENCES vessels ("vessel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "vessel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vessel the alert belongs to */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., critical, warning) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the alert (e.g., sensor, manual) */,
  "severity" INTEGER /* Severity level of the alert (1-5) */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Whether the alert has been resolved */,
  "resolution_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was resolved */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the alert (foreign key to users table) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_vessel_id FOREIGN KEY ("vessel_id") REFERENCES vessels ("vessel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the alert type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "vessel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vessel the route belongs to */,
  "route_name" TEXT /* Name of the route */,
  "route_description" TEXT /* Description of the route */,
  "start_port" TEXT /* Name of the starting port */,
  "end_port" TEXT /* Name of the ending port */,
  "distance" REAL /* Total distance of the route in nautical miles */,
  "estimated_time" TEXT /* Estimated time to complete the route */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the route (e.g., planned, active, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_vessel_id FOREIGN KEY ("vessel_id") REFERENCES vessels ("vessel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "route_points" (
  "point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route point */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route the point belongs to */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the point */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the point */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the point */,
  "speed" REAL /* Speed of the vessel at the point */,
  "heading" REAL /* Heading of the vessel at the point */,
  "course" REAL /* Course of the vessel at the point */,
  "depth" REAL /* Depth of the vessel below water level at the point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_points_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)
